purpose: The supernatural reveal and the "New Reality" establishment.
summary: Having broken free, the protagonist stands up only to realize he is naked. He looks down to see his own physical body—clothed and armed—lying lifeless on the cave floor. He realizes he has undergone a metaphysical metamorphosis.
emotional_arc: Confusion to Existential Horror and Shock.
production_intent: Establish the metaphysical shift through a visual juxtaposition of a naked, agile spirit and a clothed, lifeless physical shell. The scene must emphasize the shock of self-recognition via high-angle reveals and disorienting camera work within the cave environment.
scene_short_description: A naked figure stands over his own lifeless, armed corpse in a rocky cave.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: Vertical hierarchy between the standing spirit and the prone physical shell.

scene_end_state: protagonist stands paralyzed in horror overlooking his own corpse.

Character protagonist: An experienced Earthman fighter characterized by extreme physical fitness and superhuman agility. Following a metamorphosis, his visual state shifts from a clothed, armed combatant to a naked individual. He moves with exceptional grac...
storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH002_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the metaphysical shift through a visual juxtaposition of a naked, agile spirit and a clothed, lifeless physical shell. The scene must emphasize the shock of self-recognition via high-angle reveals and disorienting camera work within the cave environment.

## Required Cast
- protagonist (New form/Spirit)
- The Protagonist's Body (Lifeless shell)

## Required Environments
- arizona_mountain_cave

## Continuity Constraints
- Exact spatial distance between naked protagonist and clothed dead body
- Clothing and weapon set on The Protagonist's Body (Lifeless shell) must match previous combat state

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist rises from the ground
- BT002: Realization of nudity
- BT003: Discovery of the corpse
